diagrams.title: Basic Logic Gates Symbols
diagrams.description: Standard symbols for seven basic logic gates used in digital circuits
elements: AND gate symbol with flat input side
OR gate with curved input side
XOR gate with extra curved line
XNOR gate with extra curved line and bubble
diagrams.purpose: Visual recognition of gate symbols for circuit design and analysis

diagrams.title: Truth Table: Basic Operations
diagrams.description: Complete truth table showing outputs for all basic logic gates
diagrams.purpose: Reference for understanding gate behavior and solving problems

diagrams.title: De Morgan's Theorems Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of De Morgan's theorems showing bar distribution
elements: Breaking the bar changes operation illustration
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to apply De Morgan's theorems in boolean expression simplification

diagrams.title: Karnaugh Map (2-variable)
elements: K-map grid with AB as rows/columns
diagrams.purpose: Visual method for simplifying boolean expressions using K-maps
